data.title: Studio City International Holdings Limited Announces Filing of Annual Report on Form 20-F for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Studio City International Holdings Limited (NYSE: MSC) revealed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. Studio City, situated in Cotai, Macau, is a renowned integrated resort. Stakeholders can view the annual report on the Company’s investor relations website at https://ir.studiocity-macau.com/annual-reports.

data.title: Firefly Announces Discovery of New Brain Wave Biomarkers For Differential Diagnosis of ADHD
data.description: More than 22 million individuals in the United States have been diagnosed with ADHD. However, there is currently no objective biological indicator that can differentiate between the three specific subtypes of the disorder.

data.title: Clearmind Medicine Announces Hong Kong Patent Filing for Depression Therapy
data.description: A cutting-edge method involves combining MEAI and Palmitoylethanolamide to treat major depressive disorder without causing hallucinations. This innovative approach is aimed at the rapidly growing market for depression treatment, projected to exceed $25 billion by the year 2030.

data.title: XtalPi Holdings Limited to Announce 2025 Annual Results on March 25, 2026
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on March 13, 2026, XtalPi Holdings Limited, a prominent global tech firm specializing in the fusion of artificial intelligence and robotics for drug and materials exploration, disclosed its intention to release its yearly financial results. Traded as HKEX: 2228, XtalPi is recognized for its innovative approach to AI and robotics in the discovery process.

data.title: Keep Your Ego In Check And Watch Your Company Blossom
data.description: Leaders must engage in ego management to foster connections with others, a critical aspect for success. Monitoring one's ego is crucial for company growth, as highlighted in a recent article titled "Keep Your Ego In Check And Watch Your Company Blossom" by Investor's Business Daily. This emphasizes the significance of humility and self-awareness in leadership. By tempering their egos, leaders can enhance relationships within and outside their organization, ultimately driving business success.
